film.title: Morning Glory
film.overview: A young and devoted morning television producer is hired as an executive producer on a  long-running morning show at a once-prominent but currently failing station in New York City. Eager to keep the show on air, she recruits a former news journalist and anchor who disapproves of co-hosting a show that does not deal with real news stories.

dialogues.dialogue: [ Whispers ] I want a tropical fruit plate.  [ ♫ Natasha Bedingfield: Strip Me ]  ♫ Take what you want Steal my pride ♫  ♫ Build me up or cut me down to size ♫  ♫ Shut me out but I'll just scream ♫
[ Mike ] No! [ Becky ] No?  [ Mike ] Not in a thousand years.  ♫ Take what you want Steal my pride ♫  ♫ Build me up or cut me down to size ♫  ♫ Shut me out but I'll just scream ♫
